nodes.title: Display Warehouses
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/warehouse page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouses and display warehouse cards. Each card shows name, type, and item count. Clicking a card navigates to warehouse inventory view.

nodes.title: Display Warehouse Inventory
nodes.description: When warehouse is selected, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouses/:id/inventory and display inventory table with columns: item name, quantity, unit price, total value. Ghost items (quantity=0 or empty names) are filtered out.

nodes.title: Display Warehouse Operations
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/warehouse-operations page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-operations and display operations table with columns: date, warehouse, operation type, items count, total amount. Supports date filtering.

nodes.title: Create Warehouse Operation
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إضافة عملية' and fills form with {warehouseId, operationType, date, operationTypeId, items[]}, triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-operations. Success: closes form, refreshes list. Failure: shows error (e.g., 'هذا المخزن لا يتبع لهذا النشاط التجاري').
